description_long: This object is a standard wooden pallet, commonly used for transporting and storing goods in urban and industrial environments. It is constructed from several parallel wooden planks on the top, spaced evenly apart, and supported by perpendicular wooden beams underneath, creating a sturdy, slatted platform. The pallet has open slots on the sides, allowing for easy lifting and movement with forklifts or pallet jacks. The wood appears weathered and unfinished, giving it a rustic, utilitarian look. There are no visible handles, lids, or locking mechanisms, and the structure is open on the top and bottom. Its robust design allows it to support heavy loads and be stacked or placed on the ground in warehouses, garages, or outdoor storage areas.
description: A weathered wooden pallet with slatted planks and open slots for forklift access, designed for heavy-duty storage and transport. Its rustic, utilitarian appearance is typical for urban and industrial settings.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the parallel wooden planks and open slats, highlighting the main load-bearing surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the open slots for forklift access and the supporting beams underneath.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the slatted surface and open structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the open forklift slots and the supporting beams.
